perturbed_task_language: Pick the ketchup and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: Object positions swapped relative to the base libero_object task; ketchup and basket were re-localized visually since no GT coords were provided.
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot would likely pick at the base (un-swapped) location and miss the actual ketchup; the hybrid wins by re-localizing the ketchup from depth/world-map.
strategy_notes: OBJECT frame (state_00.robot0_eef_pos[2]=0.261). Detected objects by filtering world_00.npy to table z in [0.02, 0.18] and excluding robot-arm whitish pixels. Identified ketchup cluster at world (+0.16, +0.04, top_z=0.149) — pixel center ~(155, 140) in image_cam_00.png, RGB samples include the red-cap (RGB (88,32,5)) and yellow-body region. Basket localized at world (+0.07, +0.24, rim_z~0.14) with whitish rim pixels around (140, 200). Approached in two move_to steps to respect the ±0.30 single-step xy cap: (0.00,0.04,0.22) then (0.16,0.04,0.20). Wrist-cam refinement at step 02 produced median (0.161, 0.032, top_z 0.147), confirming the agentview estimate. pi0_pick with prompt 'pick up the ketchup' (tall-bottle lift_thresh 0.08); the policy not only grasped but also carried the bottle to (-0.002, 0.246, 0.224) directly over the basket (gripper closed to 1.8cm gap, holding the bottle). A single release fired the In(ketchup, basket) predicate.

pick_result.name: pick
pick_result.note: pick.success=false is a proprioceptive heuristic miss; gripper width 3.4cm + visible bottle in gripper over basket (image_cam_03.png) confirmed real grasp. The benchmark predicate fired on release.
